attributes.description: Monitor PingDirectory audit logs showing directory changes, operations by type, affected components, client IPs, and administrative activity across the environment.

params.markdown:
**Overview**

This dashboard provides visibility into audit log activity collected from PingDirectory.

It highlights audit operation trends, operation type distribution, affected directory components, top client IPs, and users performing directory changes. The dashboard helps administrators monitor configuration changes and identify unusual activity across the environment.

Visualizations include audit activity over time, operations by type, affected components, top client IPs, and an audit operations by user table. Interactive controls on event action, client IP, and observer name enable focused analysis of audit events.

Audit Activity Over Time helps identify spikes in administrative changes, while the Audit Operations by User table highlights the most active users and their associated operations.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/ping_directory/overview)**

attributes.title: [Logs PingDirectory] Audit
